case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. LUIGI STRACCIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT STRACCIA, LUIGI DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-03-2020

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-03-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

OSC RESPONSE RE SERVICE COMPLETION WITH DECLARATION (TRANSACTION ID # 200018227) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
